---
title: "Applied R"
subtitle: "Methods for Data Science pathway"
---

## Course Overview

Applied R introduces practical R workflows for data analysis in research settings. The course covers core R syntax, data manipulation, control flow, and reproducible analytic practice.

## Who This Is For

- Researchers new to R.
- Learners moving from other languages into R workflows.
- Staff supporting research analysis and reporting.

## What You Need

- A laptop with current versions of R and RStudio.
- Access to the lesson data files.
- Basic familiarity with files and folders.

## Lesson Sequence

| Lesson | Focus |
|---|---|
| [01 RStudio Intro](episodes/01-Rstudio_intro.qmd) | RStudio and project setup |
| [02 R Variables](episodes/02-R_variables_intro.qmd) | Core data types and objects |
| [03 R Functions](episodes/03-R_functions.qmd) | Writing reusable functions |
| [04 For Loops](episodes/04-for_loops.qmd) | Iteration and control flow |
| [05 The Tidyverse](episodes/05-the_tidyverse.qmd) | Modern data wrangling workflows |

## Course Materials

### Learners

- [Setup](learners/setup.qmd)
- [Reference](learners/reference.qmd)
- [Discussion](learners/discuss.qmd)

### Instructors

- [Instructor Notes](instructors/instructor-notes.qmd)
- [Additional Material](instructors/additional_material.qmd)
- [Extra Exercises](instructors/extra_exercises.qmd)

### Community and Profiles

- [Course README](README.qmd)
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.qmd)
- [Learner Profiles](profiles/learner-profiles.qmd)
- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.qmd)
- [License](LICENSE.qmd)
